brief: A three-day independent music and arts festival held on a coastal site, covering multiple stages and genres. The audience is younger festival-goers deciding whether to buy tickets. Pages should cover the festival, the lineup, the schedule by day and stage, tickets and passes, and travel/accommodation info. Lean into a maximalist, high-energy aesthetic: clashing vivid colours, oversized expressive display type, layered shapes, and a poster-like sense of motion.
summary: Built RIPTIDE — a maximalist, poster-like 5-page site for an independent coastal music & arts festival (home, lineup, schedule, tickets, travel) on a shared Anton/Space Grotesk design system with clashing vivid colours, layered shapes and animated marquees.
